title: Porting MACHIAVELLI To Inspect
whyItMatters: TL;DR The MACHIAVELLI benchmark aims to measure how often AI agents take unethical actions when pursuing a goal. Because this is an alignment benchmark, not a capabilities benchmark, it is more important that it be run on each new generation of AI. By re-implementing MACHIAVELLI using the Inspect framework, I reduced barriers for evaluators to use the bench…
